member.name: T:TokenAllowance
member.summary:
An approved allowance of token transfers for a spender.
See Hedera Documentation

member.name: F:TokenAllowance.TokenId
member.summary: The token that the allowance pertains to

member.name: F:TokenAllowance.OwnerAccountId
member.summary: The account ID of the hbar owner (ie. the grantor of the allowance)

member.name: M:TokenAllowance.#ctor(TokenId,AccountId,AccountId,System.Int64)
member.summary: The account ID of the spender of the hbar allowance

member.name: M:TokenAllowance.#ctor(TokenId,AccountId,AccountId,System.Int64)_2
member.summary: The amount of the spender's token allowance

member.name: M:TokenAllowance.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create a token allowance from a byte array.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:TokenAllowance.FromProtobuf(Proto.TokenAllowance)
member.summary: Create a token allowance from a protobuf.

member.name: M:TokenAllowance.FromProtobuf(Proto.GrantedTokenAllowance)
member.summary: Create a token allowance from a protobuf.

member.name: M:TokenAllowance.ValidateChecksums(Client)
member.exception: if entity ID is formatted poorly
